articles.title: Thailand Retains Visa
articles.excerpt: Thailand has retained visa-free entry for Indian tourists but reduced the permitted stay from 60 to 30 days. The move aims to revive tourism while tightening immigration controls and preventing misuse of visa exemptions.
articles.summary: Thailand has retained visa-free entry for Indian tourists but reduced the permitted stay from 60 to 30 days. The move aims to revive tourism while tightening immigration controls and preventing misuse of visa exemptions.
